generator: built-in image_gen with local chroma-key alpha post-processing for transparent assets

assets.finalPrompt:
House style for all assets: modern scientific-tech, calm, precise; SISP teal #11695f + deep slate; soft depth; geometric not skeuomorphic; flat vector with subtle gradient; consistent 2px-ish line weight to echo Remix Icon; transparent background unless stated. Generate at 2× for retina; export PNG (+ trace logo/icons to SVG).

"A minimalist geometric logo mark for 'SISP AppHub', a scientific HPC application hub. An abstract hexagonal node/cluster motif suggesting connected compute nodes forming a subtle 'A' or hub shape. Flat vector, single-weight lines with one soft teal-to-deep-slate gradient (teal #11695f). Clean, balanced, scalable to a 16px favicon. Transparent background, no text, generous padding."

Primary logomark prompt, candidate A. Create this asset at 1024x1024. For this source render, place the asset on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark, and no extra text unless explicitly requested.

"Horizontal logo lockup: the hexagonal hub mark at left, 'AppHub' wordmark right in a geometric sans (Inter-like), 600 weight, deep slate #131a19. 'SISP' as a smaller teal tag above or beside. Crisp vector, transparent background, balanced spacing for a top-left app header."

Create this asset at 1600x400, horizontal 4:1. Render the text exactly as: SISP and AppHub. Do not add, omit, or misspell any letters. Use only teal #11695f, deep slate #131a19, and white/transparent anti-aliasing in the subject. Avoid red, pink, purple, and magenta anywhere in the subject. For this source render, place the logo lockup on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the lockup fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. No watermark and no extra text. Retry used because the first accepted wordmark had a key-color artifact; the generator returned a white field, which was removed locally.

assets.finalPrompt:
House style for all assets: modern scientific-tech, calm, precise; SISP teal #11695f + deep slate; soft depth; geometric not skeuomorphic; flat vector with subtle gradient; consistent 2px-ish line weight to echo Remix Icon; transparent background unless stated. Generate at 2× for retina; export PNG (+ trace logo/icons to SVG).

"A set of 9 matching app-tile icons in one consistent flat-vector style, rounded-square tiles with a soft teal #11695f → slate gradient and a white line glyph centered: (1) notebook/code brackets [JupyterLab], (2) R bar-chart [RStudio], (3) flask/molecule [Galaxy], (4) Streamlit ribbon, (5) Dash dashboard grid, (6) Shiny spark, (7) API plug/brackets [FastAPI], (8) Gradio slider, (9) cube/box [host-your-app]. Single 2px line weight, identical padding and corner radius, transparent background, retina."

Create a clean 3x3 sprite sheet at 1536x1536 with one icon per 512x512 cell in exactly the numbered order: top row JupyterLab, RStudio, Galaxy; middle row Streamlit, Dash, Shiny; bottom row FastAPI, Gradio, host-your-app. Do not include labels or any text. For this source render, place the asset on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark, and no extra text unless explicitly requested. Final file is cropped from its matching sprite-sheet cell.
